category_sources: source_facts.description says Replay stored shell commands for live presentations; official README at https://github.com/sloria/doitlive#readme describes live terminal presentations.

tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions live presentations and shell commands; official README topics include cli, command-line, script, live-coding, and presentations.
